metadata.description: Run multi-step Antigravity work without drift. v2.0 adds eleven Antigravity lifecycle hooks, directive-contract pre-approval, persistent file-backed run memory, an MCP Mem0 cross-session layer, intake skill, scope-lock authority, DoD readiness, and a centralized stop validator. Codex stays lighter; antigravity takes the heavier hand.

plugins.description: /agent-pipeline-antigravity:run orchestrates multi-step Antigravity work end-to-end. v2.0 enforcement: eleven Antigravity lifecycle hooks (SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PreToolUse/PermissionRequest/PostToolUse/PostToolUseFailure/PreCompact/PostCompact/SubagentStop/Stop/SessionEnd) deny destructive commands, block out-of-scope writes during active runs, and refuse invalid pipeline stops. Persistent file-backed memory at .agent-runs/<run-id>/memory/ survives context compaction. Optional directive-contract pre-approval (SHA-256-bound) auto-fires conformant manifest/plan gates. /agent-pipeline-antigravity:mem0 manages the MCP cross-session Mem0 layer; OSS-default, Platform behind consent.
plugins.name: agent-pipeline-antigravity
